notes: M2 gate #1. Accepted: cmd.exe %-expansion injection (fail-closed guard + model whitelist), false-approve on malformed shape (strict validation), timeout promise hang (give-up timer + win32 taskkill tree-kill), findings-verdict-with-empty-list -> codex_unavailable, reject '-' prompt arg. Partial on temp-dir accumulation: documented retention policy; rejected startup pruning of shared tmp as riskier than the problem.

M2 gate #2 (focused re-review of fixes). No regressions found; fail-closed behavior confirmed against contract. Exit codes 0/10/20/2 also live-verified locally via fake-codex harness + real gpt-5.5 round-trip.

M3 gate #1. All accepted: planned-status crash-window rollback, mid-setup-vs-later-uninstall backup rule, symlink/copy undo ownership checks, external+skill_remove rollback rows, multi-scope disambiguation, other-scope install unblocking, damaged-sentinel procedure, in-block hand-edit diff callout, failed-smoke checklist STATUS rule, Windows Appendix C, Phase3/4 model re-approval, block-action backup linkage, no-manifest ownership evidence, canonical clone URL.

M3 gate #2. Accepted: Windows symlink-failure fallback must re-approve (not silently copy), P8 must detect unmatched/duplicated END sentinels, no-manifest copy ownership needs a defined source-of-truth chain.

M3 gate #3 (execution test, fake HOME). Accepted incl. BLOCKER: Phase-4 bridge probe referenced the installed path before Phase-5 installs it (now: repo path in Phase 4, installed path re-verified in Phase 6); added §9 'Current' no-op branch; clone-URL resolution chain (git remote > README > ask, placeholder != URL); audit excludes managed block from line count; backup reuse; manifest parent retention; seq semantics; ms timestamps; Q1 echoes preflight. Rejected F6 restart-signal premise (contradicts verified docs: existing skills dirs get live pickup; agent could not test the real loader from a sandbox) — added a harmless fallback restart hint instead.

artifact: INSTALLER.md + setup-codex.md (blank-profile dogfood: fresh super E2E w/ 2 real gpt-5.5 bridge runs, §9 Current no-op, §10 uninstall)
notes: M4 gate #1. D1/D2/D3 all PASS; bridge approved in 5722ms (repo path) and 5476ms (installed path); D2 byte-identical no-op proven. Accepted 6 small fixes: .claude parent note covers both scopes; smoke field values enumerated (approved/failed/skipped); created_file:true defaults to delete on plain uninstall; §9 Current cross-references §10 ownership predicates; Q1 echo gets the already-authenticated example; setup-codex defers during-install path to INSTALLER Phase 4 as single source.

artifact: INSTALLER.md + audit.md (user fresh-session Test A: god mode, project scope, audit=now)
notes: M4 gate #2 (real user, unassisted one-line prompt — found INSTALLER.md unaided, all 8 phases spec-faithful, audit respected plugin boundaries and report-only). Accepted: (1) audit remediation vocabulary lacked a settings.json edit type — agent improvised one benignly; added 'settings diff' with same backup/diff/approval procedure; (2) project-scope install into the repo clone itself pollutes the clone's git tree — materialized when the build session's git add -A swept the tester's CLAUDE.md/.claude into pushed commit 647e143 (amended out, history force-pushed clean); added root-anchored .gitignore entries + a Q2 note.
